ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( TEXT(leaseworks__Ratio_Table__r.leaseworks__Rate_Basis__c) ='Flight Hours', OR(ISNULL(leaseworks__Flight_Hours__c), ISBLANK(leaseworks__Flight_Hours__c) ) , IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Ratio_Table__r.leaseworks__Rate_Basis__c) ='Flight Cycles', OR(ISNULL( leaseworks__Flight_Cycles__c ), ISBLANK(leaseworks__Flight_Cycles__c )) , false ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Flight Hours / Flight Cycles fields must be entered if the corresponding Rate Basis is selected on the parent record.
